entries.title: Can't Start? Try a 10-Minute Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Micro sessions for when 15 min feels long. Custom 10-min timer. Just begin. Free.
entries.h1: Even fifteen minutes feels like too much right now.
entries.painPoints:
Can't start at all.
15 min still too much.
Paralysis.
entries.recommendedSounds: White noise or minimal lofi for short bursts
entries.heroSubtitle: When starting is the hardest part, the block needs to be small enough that starting isn't a decision.
entries.painSolution:
10 minutes. That's all.
Start impossibly small.
Momentum follows.

entries.title: 25 Min Too Long? 20-Minute Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Custom 20-min blocks. Between Sprint and Pomodoro. Find your length. Free.
entries.h1: Twenty-five minutes is the hill you can't climb today.
entries.painPoints:
25 fails. 15 too short.
Need middle ground.
Wrong presets.
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or rain for sustained 20-min blocks
entries.heroSubtitle: Between 15 and 25 lies your sweet spot—but most timers force you to pick extremes.
entries.painSolution:
20 minutes. Custom preset.
Your length. Your rhythm.
Focus fits.

entries.title: Need More Than 25 Min? 30-Minute Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Custom 30-min focus blocks. Balanced work sessions. Free in Superfocus.
entries.h1: Twenty-five ends too soon. Forty-five feels impossible.
entries.painPoints:
25 too short. 45 too long.
Goldilocks problem.
No preset fits.
entries.heroSubtitle: You need something in the middle—a block long enough for real progress, short enough to start.
entries.painSolution:
30 minutes. Custom timer.
Enough depth. Still startable.
Your sweet spot.

entries.title: Flow Cut Off at 25? Try 35 Minutes | Superfocus
entries.description: Extended Pomodoro: 35-min blocks. Ride the flow wave. Custom preset. Free.
entries.h1: You enter flow at minute 23. Pomodoro kills it at 25.
entries.painPoints:
Flow at 23. Bell at 25.
Always interrupted.
Never finish thinking.
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or rain for extended flow
entries.heroSubtitle: Two extra minutes isn't the answer—ten is. Extended blocks for when you're almost there.

entries.title: Building Focus Stamina? 40-Minute Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Pre-flow 40-min blocks. Step toward Flowtime. Custom timer in Superfocus. Free.
entries.h1: You're building toward longer focus—but 45 still feels out of reach.
entries.painPoints:
45 min daunting.
25 min insufficient.
Need stepping stone.
entries.heroSubtitle: Gradual extension beats jumping straight to ultradian blocks. Train stamina in steps.
entries.painSolution:
40 minutes this week.
45 next. Build gradually.
Stamina grows.

entries.title: Between 45 and 52 Min? Custom Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: 50-min custom blocks near ultradian rhythm. Match your cycle. Free in Superfocus.
entries.h1: Your body wants ~52 minutes. Most timers offer 45 or 60.
entries.painPoints:
45 too short. 60 too long.
Body has a rhythm.
Apps ignore it.
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or ambient for deep 50-min sessions
entries.heroSubtitle: Fighting your natural rhythm with arbitrary presets wastes the focus you do manage.
entries.painSolution:
50 minutes. Your cycle.
Custom preset.
Work with biology.
